title: AI Co-Pilot: Your Digital Employee is Here! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores the role of AI co-pilots as digital employees in the workplace. The piece discusses Anthropic's Claude Tag feature for internal organizational use and examines how this technology affects employee interactions and data management.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof frames AI co-pilots as digital employees and centers on Anthropic's Claude Tag feature for internal organizational use. It looks at how the technology shapes employee interactions and data management within an enterprise. The relevant threads are digital identity, enterprise AI deployment, and data curation.
